rows.description: To Tetheswin pro bien. & dim. recens. 1 year Novr 8th 92
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description selected from `gemini-flash` as 'Tetheswin' and 'recens.' are visually more accurate than 'Tetherton' and 'receu:' from `gpt-5-mini`.
rows.english_description: Arrears received from Tetheswin covering two and a half years, due 8 November 1792.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears received from Tetheswin covering two and a half years, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: S. Newington Rectory pro an: ad Mic:
rows.notes: Amounts selected from `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` had significant errors, transposing shillings and pence and misreading '130' as '13'. The image clearly shows £130 6s 0d. Description 'Mic:' from `gemini-flash` is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Misc:'.
rows.english_description: Annual income from South Newington rectory, payable at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual income from South Newington rectory, amounting to £130 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between `gemini-flash` and `gpt-5-mini` on all fields for this total row.

rows.description: Arrearagia mspe ad fest. Micr. 1792
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash`. It correctly segmented this header from the following line and provided a more accurate transcription ('mspe' vs 'residue usque', 'Micr' vs 'Mar'). `gpt-5-mini` merged the two bottom section header lines.

rows.description: Pro parva red frument.
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash`. This row was correctly identified as a distinct header line. `gpt-5-mini` merged it with the preceding header line and misread 'Pro' as 'Few'.
